source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 8. TCF_HAD1717MC, MG 221215 (Rev.6) - PMS update/10. EC Declaration of Conformity/EC Declaration of Conformity (A-DOC-5-01) 221215 Rev.3.docx

document.title: EC Declaration of Conformity
authorityOrJurisdiction: Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EC

sourceSummary.oneLine: EC Declaration of Conformity for H&abyz digital flat panel X-ray detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG under Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports declaration that the listed products meet the provisions and Essential Requirements of Council Directive 93/42/EEC amended by 2007/47/EC for medical devices.
keyPoints: Manufacturer is H&abyz in Korea and EC Representative is JaviTech e.K in Germany.
Product is a digital flat panel X-ray detector with model names HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG and GMDN code 61108.
Classification is Class IIa by Rule 16 of Annex IX.
Notified body is MTIC InterCert S.r.l. with Notification No. 0068 and EC Certificate n. 0068/QCO-DM/308-2021.
Revision history identifies Rev.3 as revision according to the update of applicable standards dated 2022.12.15.

entities.name: MTIC InterCert S.r.l.

reviewFlags.reason: Metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but source text is an EC Declaration of Conformity referencing Council Directive 93/42/EEC, Directive 2007/47/EC, Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU, and an EU notified body.
Source model field lists HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG, but several conformity statements refer to HAD1417MCW of ADD, creating conflicting product evidence.
Serial number is provided only as placeholder text: XXXXX.
